assertions.title: No dead tabs in Dashboard TopBar

steps.expected: No history/config tabs; only pipeline view
steps.observed: TopBar showed pipeline view only; no history/config tabs visible

steps.action: Run DOM query over tab/button/link elements for history/config labels

assertions.title: Agent name click navigates to agent detail

steps.action: On dashboard, click an agent name in AgentBlock (Active Executive)

steps.observed: Agent detail page rendered with agent tabs (Dashboard/Instructions/Skills/Configuration/Runs/Budget)

assertions.title: Stream content shows tool call arguments

steps.action: Return to dashboard and expand CEO agent block stream
steps.expected: Tool call entries include tool name and arguments
steps.observed: Entries rendered as '$ command_execution {"id":...,"command":"/bin/zsh -lc ..."}' including command args

steps.expected: Tool-call arguments are visible, not just tool name
steps.observed: Multiple samples contained command_execution plus full command argument payload

steps.action: In expanded CEO stream, click a 'more' control on long reasoning text
steps.expected: Full reasoning becomes visible via expand behavior
steps.observed: Control toggled to 'less' and expanded text content became visible

steps.expected: Different entry types are visually separated
steps.observed: Tool/reasoning/result blocks were separated in the stream list

steps.action: Inspect computed styles of command_execution rows
steps.observed: Subsequent rows showed border-top: 1px solid plus margin-top/padding-top spacing (6px)

frictions.description: Dashboard agent stream expansion target is a broad clickable card region (e.g., 'CEOidle') rather than an explicit labeled expand button, so expansion required an exploratory click before 'more/less' controls appeared.
frictions.resolution: Clicked the CEO card region to expose stream entries, then used visible more/less controls.
